caption: I put him in the dryer on high heat and ran a full cycle.
hidden_touch: a sock with a smiley face visible through the dryer window, a hand-lettered sign on the wall that says 'NO SPIDERS'
scene_description: A gray oval spider with stick legs is visible through the round porthole window of a large orange dryer, tumbling mid-spin with socks and a shirt. The dryer dial is turned all the way to HIGH. Bright flat colors, white linoleum floor with a mop bucket in the corner.

caption: I packed him into a small cardboard box with no air holes and mailed him to the wrong address.
hidden_touch: the shipping label reads 'NOWHERE, NV', a tiny postal worker waves cheerfully from behind the counter
scene_description: A small sealed brown cardboard box sits on a post office counter with a red stamp that says FRAGILE. The spider's two dot eyes are barely visible through a small gap in the flap. A postal worker in a blue uniform stands behind the counter smiling. Flat bright colors, MS Paint aesthetic.

caption: I loaded him into a cannon and fired him into the far wall of the tent.
hidden_touch: a tiny crowd of stick figure spectators with O-shaped mouths, a banner above the cannon that reads 'THE AMAZING SPIDEY'
scene_description: A large red and yellow striped circus cannon points toward a brick wall inside a big top tent. The spider is shown as a small gray oval mid-flight, legs trailing behind him, heading directly into the wall. A puff of smoke comes from the cannon barrel. Spray-paint tool used for the crowd and tent stripes.

caption: I put him under with laughing gas at the dentist and never turned it off.
hidden_touch: a framed poster of a smiling tooth on the wall, the spider is wearing a tiny paper bib that says 'PATIENT'
scene_description: The spider reclines in an oversized teal dentist chair, a small gray rubber gas mask covering his face. His legs hang limply off the sides of the chair. A tank labeled N2O sits beside the chair with the valve wide open. A small framed tooth poster hangs on a pale yellow wall. Flat MS Paint colors.

caption: I tipped him into a running cement mixer and poured him into a sidewalk.
hidden_touch: a tiny hardhat sitting beside the mixer, a freshly poured sidewalk square with eight small leg-prints visible in the wet cement
scene_description: A large yellow cement mixer churns in the center of a construction site with dirt ground and an orange traffic cone nearby. The spider is mid-fall, tumbling into the open drum with wide dot eyes. In the foreground a freshly poured gray sidewalk square shows faint leg-shaped impressions. Bright flat colors, MS Paint aesthetic.
